t_ch: 既然如此，我恰好有位伙伴想引荐给各位。
t_en: In that case, I have someone I'd like to introduce to everyone.

t_ch: 凯撒言重了。我算不得什么伙伴，至多是尾被欢宴吸引的小鱼罢了。
t_en: You're too kind, Imperator. I'm hardly a partner, just a small fish drawn to the scent of celebration.

t_ch: 最后一人终于来了…
t_en: The last person finally arrives...

t_ch: 这下全明星餐馆了。
t_en: Now that's what I call an all-star restaurant.

t_ch: 剑旗爵，你最熟谙宴会筹办之事。关于餐馆的环境布设，有什么建议？
t_en: Dux Gladiorum, you're the expert in banquet planning. Got any suggestions for the restaurant's layout?

t_ch: 方才我请金织爵引路，已初步勘察过场地。白厄阁下对用餐区域的规划相当成熟，无须再作调整。
t_en: I had Dux Goldweaver show me around earlier. Lord Phainon's layout for the dining area is already top-notch. No change is needed.

t_ch: 不过，纵情欢宴总需要恰当的氛围，大快朵颐同样如此。餐馆唯独缺少了一份奏乐与酣饮，我会将所需物件悉数列出，以便置备。
t_en: But you can't throw a real feast without the right atmosphere. A good meal needs music and drinks to match. I'll jot down everything we'll need to set the mood.

t_ch: 那么，我便先行告退了。
t_en: Well then, I'll be taking my leave.

t_ch: 剑旗爵向来爱独处，随她去吧。还是依照惯例，各位决定经营主题后，就向我通报。
t_en: That's just how Dux Gladiorum is. She likes her solitude. Let her be. As usual, once you've picked a new theme for the next event, be sure to fill me in.

t_ch: 甜蜜蜜节的反响很好呢，客人们都很喜欢我们推出的菜品。
t_en: The Sweetie Festival was a big hit! Guests really loved the special dishes we rolled out.

t_ch: 趁热打铁，来讨论下第二次经营活动的主题吧？
t_en: Let's keep the momentum going! Shall we pick a theme for our next event?

t_ch: 拿「锅」作主题怎么样？都说战士手中的剑比生命更重要，对厨师而言，一口称手的锅也是他最忠诚的伙伴。
t_en: How about we center it around "pots"? Just like a warrior treasures their sword, a chef's pot is their most loyal companion.

t_ch: 蒸锅、炒锅、平底锅…无一不可。活动期间，仅制作以特定锅具完成的菜品。
t_en: Steamers, woks, skillets... you name it. During the event, we only serve dishes made with that specific type of cookware.

t_ch: 反对。形式大于内容，怎么推得出让顾客满意的菜单？
t_en: Objection. That's style over substance. How are we supposed to create a satisfying menu with a gimmick like that?

t_ch: 被武器限制，作为战士更是不合格。
t_en: It's just like someone held back by their weapon is unfit to be called a true warrior.

t_ch: 这就是你徒手作战的原因？还是说，悬锋城的菜谱里只有火烤一种方式？
t_en: Oh yeah? That's why you fight bare-handed? Or is grilling the only thing people in Castrum Kremnos know how to do?

t_ch: 别把悬锋人跟蛮族混为一谈，{RUBY_B#混账}HKS{RUBY_E#}。
t_en: Watch your mouth, {RUBY_B#numbskull}HKS{RUBY_E#}. Don't lump us in with the barbarians.

t_ch: 停！现在是开会时间，别把话题带偏啦。
t_en: Enough! Save it for after the meeting. Stay on topic.

t_ch: 哎，这么针锋相对，干脆就让你们合伙去管厨房好了，说不定有竞争反而是好事呢。
t_en: Phew, what's with all that tension? Maybe we should just have you two co-run the kitchen. Some healthy competition might actually be good for business.

t_ch: 我有个想法…
t_en: Actually... I've got an idea.

t_ch: 不如，第二次经营活动就以「竞赛」为主题吧？
t_en: Why not make the next event a "competition"?

t_ch: 噢？店长希望我和万敌认真切磋一番吗？好啊，我赞成这个提案。
t_en: Oh? You want me and Mydei to go head-to-head in the kitchen? Fine by me. I'm in.

t_ch: 你做的烤饼确实不错，但这次，我会研制出胜过你的菜品。
t_en: You make a decent pancake, I'll give you that. But this time, I'm cooking up something that'll blow yours out of the water.

t_ch: 乐意奉陪。只希望到时候，你不要又端出一盘沙拉来。
t_en: We'll see about that. Just don't show up with another salad and call it gourmet.

t_ch: *我们*也同意！这场比赛绝对会成为小妖精们关注的焦点！
t_en: We're in too! This competition will definitely be the focus of those little fairies' attention!

t_ch: 就这么定——我和你，各自掌厨三天，看谁的成绩更好。
t_en: It's settled then. You and me, three days each in the kitchen. We'll see who's a better chef.

t_ch: 可以。看在你有段时间没掌勺的份上，先手权就给你吧。
t_en: Sounds fair. It's been a while since you cooked, so I'll let you go first.

t_ch: 呵，祈祷你的自信不会招致战败的结局吧。
t_en: Heh, hope your confidence doesn't come back to bite you.

t_ch: 气氛很热烈呢！那就采用店长的提案，第二次经营活动的主题定为——「主厨角斗」！
t_en: That's a lot of excitement in the air! Then it's decided: The theme for our next event will be, as the owner suggests, Chef Showdown!

t_ch: 冲冲！小白获得先手，小敌后发！
t_en: Let's gooo! Snowy takes the first move, and De goes second!

t_ch: 你的厨房，先借我几天吧。
t_en: I'll be borrowing your kitchen for a few days.

t_ch: 无妨。总要还回来的。
t_en: No problem. You're bound to return it anyway.

t_ch: 迷迷…寻觅了大半辈子，兜兜转转，总算让我找到了——
t_en: Mem... After all these years of searching, I've finally found it —

t_ch: 料理的殿堂，太美丽了！迷！
t_en: A culinary paradise! It's so beautiful! Mem!

t_ch: 感谢夸奖。
t_en: Thanks for the compliment.

t_ch: 这是我的餐馆，直接夸我吧。
t_en: This is my restaurant. You can just say I'm amazing.

t_ch: 迷！原来就是你，「{TEXTJOIN#225}」的掌管者，黄金料理界的领军人物，迷称「开拓之主」的迷之店长……
t_en: Mem! So it's you, the one who runs {TEXTJOIN#225}, the legendary figure leading the world of golden gourmet cuisine! Mems call you the "Trailblazer of Flavor"... the mysterious owner behind it all!

t_ch: 迷迷迷，迷迷迷迷迷！遇见我们，算是你的不幸迷！
t_en: Mem! Memem, mememem! Meeting us must be the worst luck you've had all year, mem!

t_ch: 你确定没说反？
t_en: You sure it's not the other way around?

t_ch: 什么乱七八糟的…
t_en: What the heck are you harping on about...

t_ch: 迷。就告诉你吧，我们是迷路迷境中，令所有餐馆闻风丧胆的……
t_en: Mem! Alright, listen up. We are the fearsome names whispered in every restaurant of Membrance Maze...

t_ch: <size=32>美食五大天王！</size>
t_en: <size=32>The Five Gourmet Overlords!</size>

t_ch: ——你的{RUBY_B#菜品}理念{RUBY_E#}，就由我们来{RUBY_B#吃个干净}彻底否定{RUBY_E#}吧！
t_en: And we're here to {RUBY_B#eat up}completely deny{RUBY_E#} your so-called {RUBY_B#all your food}culinary philosophy{RUBY_E#}!

t_ch: 一、二、三、四…四。不是只有四个？
t_en: One, two, three, four... wait, there's only four of you?

t_ch: 就是四个。不是自称五大天王吗，还有个在哪？
t_en: Exactly. Aren't you supposed to be the Five Gourmet Overlords? Where's the fifth?

t_ch: 迷！老大岂是你们想见就能见的，得先击败我们，才有让老大出手的资格迷！
t_en: Mem! You think our boss shows up for just anyone? Beat us first, and maybe you'll earn the right to face our boss, mem!

t_ch: 伙伴们，来给这家店露几手！
t_en: Alright team, let's give this place a taste of what we've got!

t_ch: 迷迷！甜之天王在此，我的美食理念是：甜食是餐馆与顾客的美妙约会迷！
t_en: Memem! I'm the Sweet Overlord! My culinary philosophy is that dessert is a magical date between the restaurant and the customer!

t_ch: 迷…被激辣的食物杀死，正是食客最大的幸福迷……
t_en: Mem... To be slain by the taste of chili peppers is the ultimate bliss for any true foodie, mem...

t_ch: 迷迷迷迷。酸之天王拜见各位！这酸爽，难以抵挡迷！
t_en: Memememem! Sour Overlord, reporting in! This tangy zing is simply irresistible, mem!

t_ch: 迷！咸之天王，正是在下。在我看来，咸食的最高境界便是…味大，无须多盐！
t_en: Mem! I'm the Salty Overlord! For me, a master chef worth their salt lies in bold flavor, not just more salt!

t_ch: 我们正是——美食五大天王迷！
t_en: Together, we are the Five Gourmet Overlords, mem!

t_ch: 所以最后一位是…
t_en: So... where's the last one?

t_ch: 少了个能吃苦的？
t_en: Missing a Bitter Overlord or something?

t_ch: 我们将轮流发起挑战迷。看看你们的菜品，能否填饱挑剔的胃口迷！
t_en: We'll challenge you one by one, mem! Let's see if your cooking can satisfy our picky palates!

t_ch: 是很能吃的大胃王客人呀。{NICKNAME}，好好招待它们，说不定能带来许多收益。
t_en: Big appetites, huh? {NICKNAME}, treat them well. If we win them over, it could mean big business.

t_ch: 来得正好。万敌，这些大胃王妖精，正是最合适的评委。
t_en: Perfect timing. Mydei, these competitive eater fairies make ideal judges.

t_ch: 不用提醒，我看得出来。先给你试试吧。
t_en: No need to remind me. I can tell that. I'll let them test you first.

t_ch: 迷！居然敢无视我们！所有的王之妖精，尽情发泄你们的{RUBY_B#食欲}怒火{RUBY_E#}迷！
t_en: Mem! Ignoring us!? All fairy Overlords, unleash your {RUBY_B#appetite}fury{RUBY_E#}! Mem!

t_ch: 起初，你以为这只是场普通的比试，不过是白厄和万敌又一次惯常的较量。
t_en: At first, you thought this was just another friendly cook-off, a typical Phainon vs. Mydei showdown.

t_ch: 直到这场竞赛逐渐演变，开始和迷境中的每个妖精都息息相关……
t_en: But then, the contest began to spiral into something that entwines every fairy in the Maze...

t_ch: 白厄主厨的支持者，请让我看到你们的热情迷！
t_en: Supporters of Chef Phainon, let me hear your passion, mem!

t_ch: ——迷！迷迷！白厄主厨，白厄主厨！
t_en: Mem! Memem! Chef Phainon! Chef Phainon!

t_ch: 现在，敌方已经攻到阵前，要向它们妥协吗？要向它们屈服吗？迷！
t_en: The enemy's drawing near! Should we back down? Should we surrender, mem?

t_ch: 不！我们要拼尽全力，守卫主厨迷！
t_en: No! We'll give it everything we've got to defend our chef, mem!

t_ch: ——迷！迷迷！白厄主厨，你菜刀尖闪动的光芒，就是我此生不变的信仰！
t_en: Mem! Memem! Chef Phainon, the glint of your kitchen knife is the light that guides my soul!

t_ch: ——迷！迷迷！为白厄主厨，献上毛绒迷！
t_en: Mem! Memem! Presenting the fluff for Chef Phainon!

t_ch: …阵仗不小啊。知道无法胜过我，打算用人海战术么？
t_en: ...Quite the turnout. Can't beat me in the kitchen, so you're going for strength in numbers?

t_ch: 你那边不也一样？
t_en: Like you're not doing the same thing?

t_ch: 对面的，时代已经变了迷！万敌主厨掌勺的餐馆里，没有你们的位置！
t_en: Listen up, opposing team! Times have changed, mem! There's no place for you in a restaurant where Chef Mydei makes the call!

t_ch: 趁还来得及。赶紧投敌迷！记住，要投敌！
t_en: Hurry to our side while you still can! Defect to Mydei, mem! Mark my words: Defect to Mydei!

t_ch: ——迷迷！迷！带我们再赢一次吧，万敌主厨！
t_en: Memem! Mem! Lead us to another victory, Chef Mydei!

t_ch: 到底是怎么发展到这步的。
t_en: How did things end up like this?

t_ch: 但真正能决定这场胜负的，只能是我们两人的对决。
t_en: At the end of the day, the only thing that can truly determine the outcome of this match is the duel between us.

t_ch: 也罢。按规则，今天轮到我掌勺了。
t_en: Fair enough. By the rules, it's my turn to take the helm in the kitchen today.

t_ch: ——迷迷！迷！三日之期已到，现在，万敌主厨将夺回属于他的一切迷！
t_en: Memem! Mem! The three-day wait is over. Chef Mydei is here to reclaim what's rightfully his, mem!

t_ch: ——迷！迷迷！我们会守护白厄主厨的一切！
t_en: Mem! Memem! We'll protect everything Chef Phainon stands for!

t_ch: 来吧。厨房还给你。看看你的菜单，是否真的会比我更受欢迎。
t_en: Alright, the kitchen's yours again. Let's see if your menu really draws more fans than mine.

t_ch: 那就瞧好了。
t_en: Well, watch closely.

t_ch: 今天便是揭晓胜负的时刻。吞下失败的苦果前，你还有什么想说的？
t_en: Today is when the victor will be decided. Any last words before you taste the bitter sting of defeat?

t_ch: 急什么，都还没开始营业。
t_en: Slow down. We haven't even started the business yet.

t_ch: 怕你等会就没心情了。可别输得太难看了啊，万敌主厨。
t_en: You might not be in the mood later. Don't embarrass yourself too badly, Chef Mydei.

t_ch: 食客才需要动嘴，厨师靠的是手头功夫。
t_en: Guests talk. Chefs let their hands do the talking.

t_ch: 多说无益。开始吧。
t_en: No more words. Let's get to it.

t_ch: ——谁能代表「{TEXTJOIN#225}」，请你来投票迷！
t_en: Who will win the right to represent "{TEXTJOIN#225}"? Please cast your vote, mem!

t_ch: 「主厨角斗」正火热进行。究竟是来自悬锋城的烹饪大师，万敌主厨更胜一筹……
t_en: The "Chef Showdown" is heating up! Will Chef Mydei from Castrum Kremnos rise to the top...

t_ch: 我从不担心。不会有人尝不出鲜血蜜酿和白开水的差别吧？
t_en: I'm not worried about this. Surely folks can taste the difference between sanguine honey brew and boiled water?

t_ch: 还是在哀丽秘榭主场作战的白厄主厨更能征服顾客的味蕾……
t_en: ...or will Chef Phainon, fighting on home turf here in Aedes Elysiae, win over the crowd?

t_ch: 不过是悬锋人的小众爱好，真当所有人都喜欢就大错特错了。
t_en: That honey brew might be a niche trend for Kremnoans, but don't assume everyone's into it.

t_ch: 激烈的争锋！两位主厨都相当有信心迷！公布结果前，我想先悄咪咪采访店长。
t_en: What a tight race! Both chefs are brimming with confidence, mem! But before we announce the result, let's sneak a quick word with the owner.

t_ch: 在您看来，这场厨艺对决谁更可能胜出迷？
t_en: In your opinion, who has the edge in this culinary clash, mem?

t_ch: 支持白厄。
t_en: I'm backing Phainon.

t_ch: 白厄是餐馆最初的厨师，土生土长的哀丽秘榭人，他制作的菜品，或许会更适合妖精们的口味。
t_en: He was our restaurant's very first chef, born and raised right here in Aedes Elysiae. His dishes probably suit the local fairies' tastes more naturally.

t_ch: 万敌的赢面更大。
t_en: Mydei's got the upper hand.

t_ch: 万敌身为成名已久的大厨，带领悬锋孤军辗转世界各地，充分吸收了诸多城邦的美食文化。论经验，他的地位恐怕难以撼动。
t_en: He's a world-class chef who's led the Kremnoan Detachment across the world, learning from many city-states' cuisine. His experience alone makes him hard to beat.

t_ch: 作为店长不能有偏袒…
t_en: As the owner of this restaurant, I must remain neutral...

t_ch: 无论白厄还是万敌，他们都是本店的厨师。我自然不该偏向任何一方。这个问题，恕我无可奉告。
t_en: Both Phainon and Mydei are valued chefs here. I can't afford to take sides. I'm afraid I have no comment.

t_ch: 迷迷！感谢店长的回答。那么，现在就有请副店长，为我们宣布竞赛的结果迷！
t_en: Memem! Thank you, owner! Now, let's bring in our deputy owner to reveal the results, mem!

t_ch: 哎呀，好多妖精盯着这边，有点紧张呢。感谢刻律德菈提供的数据，我就照着读啦？
t_en: Oh wow, all these fairies staring at me... kinda nerve-wracking! Thanks to Cerydra for compiling the numbers. I'll just read them straight out, okay?

t_ch: 白厄与万敌，两位主厨轮流掌勺期间，各自售出的菜品份数……
t_en: During their respective turns in the kitchen, chef Phainon and chef Mydei each sold...

t_ch: <size=28>完全相同！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Exactly the same number of orders!</size>

t_ch: 噢？你的厨艺进步不小啊，再来一场如何？
t_en: Oh? Looks like you've leveled up your skills. How about another round?

t_ch: 行啊。这次想比什么？要是再等六天，未免有些太慢了。
t_en: Sure thing. What's the challenge this time? But waiting another six days sounds way too long.

t_ch: 今日就决出胜负。即将召开的美食评选，就由那几位评审员来做出判断。
t_en: Let's settle it today. We'll let those judges decide in the upcoming gourmet contest.

t_ch: 好。我当然乐意奉陪。
t_en: Sounds good to me. I'm in.

t_ch: 该请遐蝶出场了。
t_en: Time to bring out Castorice.

t_ch: 这次总能分出高低了吧？
t_en: Guess we'll finally see who's the better chef, once and for all.

t_ch: 评审员只有三位，不可能出现平票的情况。
t_en: With only three judges, there's no chance of a tie.

t_ch: 哈，没想到你考虑得这么细。既然如此，就烦请遐蝶小姐出场吧。
t_en: Hah, didn't expect you to think so far ahead. In that case, let's call in Miss Castorice.

t_ch: 好呀。正巧时间快到了，这就动身去参加美食评审吧。
t_en: Sure! Just about time. Let's go for the gourmet contest.

t_ch: 我和万敌都做好准备了，随时可以出发。
t_en: Mydei and I are all set. We can head out anytime.

t_ch: 走吧，这场比赛该有结果了。
t_en: Let's go. It's time we settled this.

t_ch: 出发吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 还有点事要处理…
t_en: Still got a couple of things to wrap up...

t_ch: 没关系。忙完后，来找我就好。
t_en: No worries. Just come find me when you're done.

t_ch: ——迷！迷迷！白厄主厨，我们永远在你的身后迷！
t_en: Mem! Memem! Chef Phainon, we'll always have your back, mem!

t_ch: ——迷迷！迷！干净利落地击败对手吧，万敌主厨！
t_en: Mem! Memem! Take them down quick and clean, Chef Mydei!

t_ch: 二位的厨艺对决我有所耳闻。但发展到如此地步，实在始料未及……
t_en: I've heard about your culinary rivalry, but I never imagined it would escalate like this...

t_ch: 遐蝶小姐不用拘束，按你心中的想法给出评价即可。
t_en: No need to hold back, Miss Castorice. Just speak from your heart.

t_ch: 既然将评判权交给旁人，我和他都已做好了告负的准备。
t_en: Since we entrusted the judgment to others, we're both ready to accept the outcome, whatever it may be.

t_ch: 明白了。那么，请将选定的菜品摆放至桌上吧。
t_en: Understood. Then please present your selected dishes on the table.

t_ch: 决定了。我选择的送审菜品，是这份「黄金薯条鸡块」。
t_en: I've made my decision. The dish I'm submitting is this "Golden Potato Fries and Chicken Nugget."

t_ch: 食材质量是菜品的根本，而我对哀丽秘榭的麦田有信心。我很清楚，这片土地上的作物与肉类有多鲜美，独特的风味能让所有品尝者赞不绝口。
t_en: Great dishes start with great ingredients, and I believe in the wheat fields of Aedes Elysiae. I know exactly how flavorful this land's crops and meats are. Their unique taste is sure to leave a lasting impression.

t_ch: 说得还不错。我选的是这道，「敦实杂蔬汤」。
t_en: Well said. As for me, I'm going with "Hearty Vegetable Potage."

t_ch: 不打算给大家说说理由吗？
t_en: Aren't you gonna tell us why?

t_ch: 没必要。开始吧。
t_en: No need. Let's just get started.
Mem...

t_ch: 白厄阁下制作的菜品，初看或许觉得简陋，但入口便能感受到极为饱满的谷物与油炸焦香，外酥里嫩，是别处难品尝到的美味。
t_en: Lord Phainon's dish may look plain at first glance, but one bite reveals its true depth: rich grain and oil-fried aromas, a crisp crust, and tender center. It's indeed a rare and delightful treat.

t_ch: 而万敌阁下对哀地里亚的传统炖菜做出了改良，增添了用以提鲜的酸味，汤底浓郁却不会感到腻，北地特有的刺激口味被淡化，只留下了温暖的感受。
t_en: Meanwhile, Lord Mydei has reimagined Aidonia's traditional stew with a touch of acidity that lifts the flavor. The broth is hearty without being heavy, and the bold northern spices have been mellowed into a warm, comforting finish.

t_ch: 若换作平时，我会为两份菜品都给出满分。
t_en: If this were a regular tasting, I'd give both dishes a perfect score.

t_ch: 但似乎…这并非各位想要的结果。
t_en: But... I get the feeling that's not the answer everyone's looking for.

t_ch: ——迷！迷迷！继续为白厄主厨应援！
t_en: Memem! Mem! Keep cheering for Chef Phainon!

t_ch: ——迷迷！迷！别执迷不悟了，要投敌！投敌！
t_en: Memem! Mem! Stop being so stubborn! You need to switch sides and vote for Mydei!

t_ch: 难分胜负啊。
t_en: Hard to tell who's gonna win.

t_ch: 但角斗必须得有结果…
t_en: Still, every duel must have a winner...

t_ch: 该如何是好呢……
t_en: So... what do we do now?

t_ch: 既然这道菜分不出胜负，再追加一道便是了。你不介意多比试几个回合吧？
t_en: If these dishes are too evenly matched, let's just go another round. You don't mind, do you?

t_ch: 当然可以。要是你输得太快，反而没意思。
t_en: Not at all. It'd be rather boring if you were to lose the game too soon.

t_ch: 这道「二仁月饼」怎么样？咸香可口，色泽金黄酥脆，想必能让遐蝶小姐满意。
t_en: How about this one: "Double-Nut Mooncake"? Golden, crunchy, and packed with savory flavor. I bet Miss Castorice will love it.

t_ch: 不如尝尝我特制的「盛宴香汁烤鸡」，口感丰富，鲜嫩多汁，正好用来中和他那过分的咸味。
t_en: Try my "Feast-Gravy Roast Chicken." It's juicy, full of flavor, and just the thing to balance out that overly salty taste of his.

t_ch: 这…我来简单品尝。请两位主厨停手，不要再制作新的菜品了。
t_en: Well... I'll have a quick taste. But you two, please stop cooking! No more new dishes!

t_ch: 我真正的拿手菜还没端出来呢。这道「云羊肋排」，请各位评审员一并品尝。
t_en: Hey now, I haven't even brought out my signature dish! Presenting my "Cloudsheep Ribs." Judges, please enjoy.

t_ch: 菜单里有这道菜吗？
t_en: Wait, was that even on the menu?

t_ch: 你从哪找来的云羊啊！
t_en: Where the heck did you even find a cloudsheep!?

t_ch: 刚烹制的「糖醋烩鸡」，请。
t_en: Freshly made "Sweet & Sour Braised Chicken," coming right up.

t_ch: 还没完。这份「咸制熏肉」是我厨师生涯的集大成之作，绝对不会输给任何人。请品尝！
t_en: We're not done yet. This "Salty Smoked Meat" is the pinnacle of my culinary career, my magnum opus that outperforms every other dish. You have to try it!

t_ch: 「酸豆泥」，请。
t_en: Here's some "Pickled Bean Purée." Enjoy.

t_ch: 迷…吃不下了迷……
t_en: Mem... can't eat another bite, mem...

t_ch: 我申请暂停这场美食评审…多出来的这些菜品到底该怎么处理啊……
t_en: I motion to pause the tasting... What are we even supposed to do with all these extra dishes...

t_ch: 迷！到我们登场的时候了！我们的胃如巨渊似深海，吞得下任何食物迷！
t_en: Mem! That's our cue! Our stomachs are like bottomless pits. We can handle anything, mem!

t_ch: 你还有招吗？我才刚进入状态，手感正热呢。
t_en: You done already? I'm just getting warmed up!

t_ch: 悬锋城的菜谱比你想的要厚得多，继续吧。
t_en: You think you've seen it all? Castrum Kremnos's cookbook is way thicker than you imagine. Let's keep going!

t_ch: 好啊。「盐炙火腿配无花果」，请品尝！
t_en: Alright then. "Salt-Seared Ham with Figs," dig in!

t_ch: 「柠檬乳酪汁烤整角猪」，请。
t_en: And here's "Roasted Hornswine with Lemon-Cream Sauce." Have a taste.

t_ch: 「海陆双拼至尊烩菜」，请品尝！
t_en: Try this one: "Surf & Turf Deluxe Stew." The name says it all.

t_ch: 「蜂蜜裹炸八爪鱼」，请。
t_en: "Honey-Crusted Fried Octopus!" Enjoy.

t_ch: 迷…我们认输！真的、真的吃不动了。
t_en: Mem... We surrender! Seriously, we're full to bursting!

t_ch: 迷迷！老大，快救救我们，救救迷境迷！
t_en: Memem! Boss! Help us! Help the Maze, mem!

t_ch: 嗯？只要吃掉所有的饵料就好吧？
t_en: Hmm? So I just need to eat every bait, right?

t_ch: …我开始了。
t_en: ...Alright. I'm going in.

t_ch: 两位主厨还在不停地上菜，但桌面上的菜品却正在以惊人的速度消失……
t_en: The two chefs keep bringing out dish after dish, but somehow, the food is vanishing at an alarming rate...

t_ch: 味道很不错，确实是极致的美食盛宴。但是…两位厨师，还有没端出来的菜品么？
t_en: Delicious. This really is the ultimate feast. But... chefs, is there anything left you haven't served?

t_ch: 哈哈。多么滑稽，我们两个拼尽了全力，都没能满足海瑟音小姐的胃口。
t_en: Haha... Isn't this something? We gave it everything we had, and still couldn't satisfy Miss Hysilens's appetite.

t_ch: 看来此次竞赛的胜者，并非你我中的一人。
t_en: Seems the real winner of this culinary duel wasn't either of us.

t_ch: …海瑟音完胜？
t_en: ...So Hysilens won by a landslide?

t_ch: 没想到海瑟音小姐才是隐藏的大胃王。好在危机总算化解了。
t_en: Never saw it coming. Turns out Miss Hysilens is a secret competitive eater. But anyway, at least this crisis is finally averted!

t_ch: {NICKNAME}阁下，两位主厨的菜品都极为优秀。尽管引发了混乱，但也足以证明餐馆拥有通过评审的实力。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, both chefs delivered outstanding dishes. Even though things got a little out of hand, it's clear this restaurant has what it takes to pass the review.

t_ch: 作为晋级的证明，我将为店长颁发迷其林星级奖章。请收下吧。
t_en: As proof of your success, I now present the Memchelin Star Award to the owner. Please accept it!

t_ch: 迷！我们郑重宣布，从现在起，「{TEXTJOIN#225}」就是三星级餐馆了迷！
t_en: Mem! We'd like to officially announce that from this day forth, {TEXTJOIN#225} is a certified 3-star restaurant, mem!

t_ch: 继续加油！朝着四星级的目标前进迷！
t_en: Keep it up and shoot for that four-star rating next!

t_ch: 距离终点只有一步之遥了。
t_en: We're just one step away from the finish line.

t_ch: 迷！冲冲！成为四星级餐馆后，村长有惊喜要送给各位迷！
t_en: Mem! Let's gooo! Once you hit 4 stars, the village chief has a special surprise for you, mem!

t_ch: 成为四星级有奖励吗？
t_en: There's a reward for hitting four stars?

t_ch: 迷！村长交代过，会有惊喜送给餐馆的各位，但现在还不能说迷！
t_en: Mem! The village chief said there'll be a surprise for the whole restaurant team, but we're not allowed to spill the beans yet, mem!

t_ch: 没想到两位主厨的竞赛，最终会由海瑟音小姐划下句号…还挺出乎意料的吧？
t_en: Who would've thought that this culinary clash between the chefs would end with Miss Hysilens stealing the spotlight? Pretty wild twist, huh?

t_ch: 至于村长说的惊喜，究竟是什么呢。看来只有等餐馆达到四星级后才能知道了。
t_en: So, about that surprise the village chief mentioned... Guess we'll only find out once the restaurant hits four stars.

t_ch: 今天的事情都忙完啦，店长也早点去休息吧。
t_en: That's a wrap for today. You should get some rest too, owner.

t_ch: 明天见！
t_en: See you tomorrow!

t_ch: 好呀，祝你做个甜甜的梦。明天见！
t_en: You got it. Sweet dreams! See you then!

t_ch: 还有事情要处理…
t_en: Still got a couple of things to wrap up...

t_ch: 嗯，我就在这等你，要快点回来哦。
t_en: Alright, I'll wait right here. Don't keep me hanging, okay?

t_ch: 两位阁下，知道自己做错了什么吗？
t_en: You two, do you realize what you've done wrong?

t_ch: 抱歉。
t_en: My apologies.

t_ch: 哎。热衷竞赛没什么问题，但别胡乱使用餐馆的食材呀！
t_en: *sigh* I'm all for a little friendly competition, but don't go wasting the restaurant's ingredients like that!

t_ch: 那些农作物都是我和那刻夏老师，还有田管妖精们一起辛辛苦苦种出来的。大家的心血和汗水，就这么白白地全浪费掉了，多不值啊。
t_en: Those crops were grown with a lot of care by me, Professor Anaxa, and the farm fairies. You just wasted everyone's hard work. That's a real shame.

t_ch: 知道自己错了吗？
t_en: You get why that's a problem now?

t_ch: 我也要狠狠加入批评。
t_en: I'm gonna tell you off too.

t_ch: 店长，对不起。昨天光顾着和万敌的比试，没考虑到食材的问题。
t_en: Boss, I'm sorry. I got too caught up in the cook-off with Mydei and didn't think things through.

t_ch: …以后注意。
t_en: ...I won't let it happen again.

t_ch: 还有呢，经过这轮意料外的巨量消耗，我们的库存也快见底了。
t_en: Also, thanks to that surprise feast, our inventory's nearly wiped out.

t_ch: 即便算上今天的收获，食材储备也远低于警戒线。按目前客流量的上升速度，我们很快就将面临无菜可用的情况。
t_en: Even after today's harvest, our food stock is way below the danger line. At this rate, with more and more customers pouring in, we'll be out of ingredients in no time.

t_ch: 恐怕只有农田的产量突然翻上好几倍，才有可能解决这次危机吧。
t_en: Unless our farmland output magically multiplies overnight, this could get ugly.

t_ch: 多雇点妖精来种地怎么样？
t_en: What if we hire more fairies to work the fields?

t_ch: 不行呀。农田的产出速度有限，不是投入更多人力就能提高的。
t_en: That won't do. There's a natural cap on how fast crops can grow. It's not just about manpower.

t_ch: 去找赛飞儿多进点货？
t_en: Couldn't we buy more from Cipher?

t_ch: 唔，我倒是去问过了。肉类和特殊食材可以买到，但蔬菜还是得从地里种才行呢。
t_en: I've already asked her. We can stock up on meat and rare ingredients, but when it comes to veggies, well, those still need to be grown in the fields.

t_ch: 不如问问神奇的那刻夏老师吧！
t_en: Then maybe we should ask the ever-miraculous Professor Anaxa for help!

t_ch: 哎…事到如今，也只有这个办法了。
t_en: *sigh* At this point, that might be our only option.

t_ch: 灰宝，我们去问问看吧，希望老师这次还能拿出什么厉害的炼金秘药来。
t_en: Grayie, let's go see what the professor says. Hopefully, he's got another one of his brilliant alchemical fixes up his sleeve.

t_ch: 不过，在此之前……
t_en: But before that...

t_ch: 还请两位阁下去农田里劳作数日，以示惩戒。
t_en: You two are going to work the fields for a few days as punishment.

t_ch: 只有亲身体验过种植的艰辛，才能深刻认识到浪费食物是件多么可耻的行为吧。
t_en: Only by experiencing how tough farming really is can you understand just how shameful wasting food is.

t_ch: 我接受。
t_en: Sounds fair.

t_ch: 好。希望那刻夏老师不会因此大发雷霆……
t_en: Alright. Just hope Professor Anaxa doesn't get mad at me over this...

t_ch: …不是不行。
t_en: ...It's not impossible.

t_ch: 但是，得等我先想到答案。
t_en: But first, I need to come up with a solution.

t_ch: 我正好烦躁得很。风堇，去把我的那几个学生叫过来。我要给你们再上一课。
t_en: It happens that I'm in a bad mood. Hyacine, go round up my students. It's time for another lesson.

t_ch: 白厄在哪？
t_en: Where's Phainon?

t_ch: 不得不说，亲自下地劳作后，感觉我对烹饪的理解又提升了一层啊。
t_en: I'm not gonna lie. Working the land really gives me a deeper appreciation for cooking.

t_ch: 哼。剑和菜刀都使得一般，挥起锄头来倒挺厉害。
t_en: Tch. You swing a hoe better than a sword or a cleaver. I'd give you that.

t_ch: 那刻夏老师，突然叫我们过来，是有什么急事吗？
t_en: Professor Anaxa, you called us so suddenly. What's the emergency?

t_ch: 辩论是灵感的源泉，而我正在思考某个难题。你们若有想法，可以随时打断我。
t_en: Debate fuels inspiration, and I'm pondering a rather puzzling question. Feel free to interrupt me anytime if you've got ideas.

t_ch: 本次的研讨课题便是——「大地兽为何如此庞大？」
t_en: Today's discussion topic: Why are dromas so enormous?

t_ch: 我们不是在聊种地吗？
t_en: Wait, weren't we talking about farming?

t_ch: 按常理想，应该是大地泰坦的缘故吧。吉奥里亚的造物大多身形伟岸，山之民同样如此。
t_en: Well, if we're being logical, it's probably because of the Earth Titan. Most of Georios's creations are built big, and the Mountain Dwellers are no exception.

t_ch: 要是艾格勒也参与创生的话，说不定大地兽还能长出翅膀呢。
t_en: If Aquila had been involved in their creation, imagine — winged dromas roaming about!

t_ch: 标准的回答。正确有余，发散性却不足。及格分。
t_en: Textbook answer. Correct but uninspired. You pass, but only just.

t_ch: 还有两个。你们怎么想？
t_en: Two more to hear from. Thoughts?

t_ch: （向遐蝶使眼色）
t_en: (Gives Castorice a pointed look)

t_ch: …明白了，那便由我先回答吧。
t_en: Point taken. I'll go first.

t_ch: （主动抢答）
t_en: (Cuts in with enthusiasm)

t_ch: 正确答案只有一个，那便是……
t_en: There's really only one correct answer here...

t_ch: 不大就不叫大地兽了。
t_en: They wouldn't be called "dromas" if they weren't en-ormous!

t_ch: 哼。名称不过是随手捏造的符号，拘泥于此未免太过表面。不合格。
t_en: Hmph. Names are just convenient labels. Such shallow reasoning. Fail.

t_ch: 因为大地兽吃得多！
t_en: Because they eat tons and tons of food!

t_ch: 若是如此，那些妖精怕是要膨胀得无边无界了。只注重现象。不合格。
t_en: Then our fairy friends would be universe-sized by now. You're confusing symptom with cause. Fail.

t_ch: 老师，{NICKNAME}阁下或许还未想好，由我先作答吧。
t_en: Professor, I think {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} might need more time. Might I offer my answer first?

t_ch: 我曾在书中见过这样的说法。起初，大地兽的体型和所有生物无异，但它形单影只，实在太孤独了，于是便走过世界各个角落，吞吃掉了遇见的所有生命。
t_en: I read an interesting theory once that dromas started out normal-sized but were desperately lonely, so they roamed the world consuming every creature they found.

t_ch: 随着心灵逐渐满足，它的身躯也变得越发庞大，直到…变成现在的模样。
t_en: As their hearts found fulfillment, their bodies expanded proportionally... eventually reaching their current enormous size.

t_ch: 这个故事是你写的吗？
t_en: You wrote this story yourself, didn't you?

t_ch: 不是。是偶然间在书店翻阅到的，我还写不出这么…独特的故事，嗯。
t_en: No, just found it by chance in a bookstore. I couldn't write something so... peculiar.

t_ch: 气氛变沉重了！
t_en: Well, that got dark fast!

t_ch: 啊，抱歉。只是老师的提问，让我无意中想到了这个故事。
t_en: Oh! Sorry about that. The question just reminded me of that story.

t_ch: 这个答案，感觉会让老师更生气……
t_en: I think that answer's only going to make the professor more upset...

t_ch: 是啊！我怎么就没想到。农作物体型极难突破品种限制，但若是使用炼金技术，将多个作物联结乃至融合起来，或许便能创造不可能之物！
t_en: That's it! Why didn't I think of that? Plants rarely exceed their natural size limits, but through alchemy, we could connect or even merge multiple crops to create something extraordinary!

t_ch: 你们，来帮我准备炼金药水。
t_en: Come, help me prepare these alchemical concoctions.

t_ch: …云羊鬃毛，识之花的灵液，黑潮造物的脚爪，正阳狮鹫的蛋清，奇美拉之角……
t_en: Cloudsheep wool, Cognos Bloom ichor, Black Tide Creature claws, Noontide Gryphon egg whites, chimera horns...

t_ch: 以及，妖精的尾巴……
t_en: And the last ingredient... a Fairy's Tail...

t_ch: 什么的尾巴？
t_en: Did you say a FAIRY'S tail?

t_ch: 啊？村长知道这事吗？
t_en: Wait, does the chief know you're doing this?

t_ch: 放心。这是迷境里的一种植物，叫这个名字，只是因为和妖精的大尾巴长得很像啦。
t_en: Relax! It's just a plant from the Maze that happens to look like a fairy's bushy tail.

t_ch: 呼…材料齐备，该开始炼制了。
t_en: Perfect... ingredients collected. Time to start the alchemical transformation.

t_ch: 炼金术与烹饪自有其共通之处，无非是将指定的材料投进器具中，以恰当的手法进行混合，适时调整反应环境，直至得到想要的结果。
t_en: Alchemy shares much with cooking, combining specific ingredients in suitable containers, applying proper techniques, and manipulating environmental conditions until you achieve your intended outcome.

t_ch: 看好了，这便是此世最伟大的——
t_en: Observe carefully, for this shall be the most magnificent—
KABOOM—

t_ch: …是温度出了差错么。再试一次。
t_en: Must have been a temperature issue. Let's try again.

t_ch: 砰砰——
t_en: KABOOM CRASH—

t_ch: 哇！怎、怎么突然地震了？！
t_en: Waaah! Wh—What's with the sudden earthquake!?

t_ch: 搅拌力度太大了？再来一次。
t_en: Too much force in the mixing? Let's go again.

t_ch: 砰砰砰砰砰——啪！
t_en: KABOOM CRASH BANG BOOM CRACK — POP!

t_ch: …再一次！
t_en: Again!

t_ch: 你已经数不清这场炼金实验究竟重复了多少次，只知道耳旁的爆炸声从未断绝过……
t_en: It's impossible to count how many times this experiment has been attempted. The constant explosions have become the soundtrack to your day...
Hah...

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈…哈哈哈哈哈！
t_en: Hahahaha...HAHAHAHAHA!

t_ch: ——至是，工程已毕，感到高兴吧，我找到了突破农作物固有限制的方法！
t_en: Behold, my work is complete! Rejoice, for I have discovered how to break through crops' natural size limits!

t_ch: 炼金成功了？
t_en: Did your alchemy actually work?

t_ch: 你就是最顶尖的农业专家。
t_en: You're absolutely the finest agricultural expert.

t_ch: 来。我带你们见识全新物种的诞生！
t_en: Come with me! I'll show you the birth of an entirely new species!

t_ch: …难得这几天不用做饭，等会去哪逛逛？
t_en: ...It's a rare break from cooking these days. Where should we go hang out later?

t_ch: 先干完农活再说吧。
t_en: Let's finish the farm work first.

t_ch: 就拿这块田做实验吧。
t_en: This plot will be perfect for our experiment.

t_ch: 虽说老师对炼金术的钻研极为精深，但用来培育农作物…我还是第一次见。
t_en: I'm well aware of the Professor's alchemical expertise, but using it for crop cultivation... that's certainly a first.

t_ch: 别、别紧张，说不定真会有奇迹发生呢。
t_en: N—No need to worry. Maybe something amazing will actually happen.
Heh.

t_ch: 恍惚间，你好像听见了悉悉索索的声响，像是枝叶在尽情舒展，又像是土地的隐秘呼唤。
t_en: In your trance-like state, you detect rustling noises, like plants stretching toward the sky, or perhaps the earth whispering its secrets.

t_ch: 而后，出现在你眼前的……
t_en: And then, what appears before you is...

t_ch: <size=28>是比妖精的个头还高的巨大南瓜！</size>
t_en: <size=28>...an enormous pumpkin that's bigger than a whole fairy!</size>

t_ch: 太厉害了！有了这些巨型蔬菜，餐馆再也不用担心食材短缺的问题了！
t_en: That's incredible! With these giant vegetables, food shortages will be a thing of the past for our restaurant!

t_ch: 一个南瓜吃一年。
t_en: One pumpkin's all, from spring to fall!

t_ch: 有了炼金术，亩产一万八！
t_en: Alchemy's yield, fills every field!

t_ch: 还算符合预期。我再来试试其余作物。
t_en: Hmm, not too shabby. Let's see how the other crops will turn out.

t_ch: 既然巨型蔬菜是老师研发出来的，那我有个提案。
t_en: Given that the professor created these giant vegetables, I'd like to make a proposal.

t_ch: 灰宝，餐馆不是会定期举办主题经营活动嘛，下个负责人…就由那刻夏老师来担任吧？
t_en: Grayie, the restaurant runs themed events periodically, right? Why not let Professor Anaxa take charge of the next one?

t_ch: 我没意见。
t_en: Fine by me.

t_ch: 他本人有这个意愿吗？
t_en: But is he actually interested?

t_ch: 正好白厄阁下和万敌阁下会来农田帮忙，这段时间，老师就去热闹的地方转转吧。
t_en: Lord Phainon and Lord Mydei will be managing the fields, so professor, wouldn't you prefer spending time somewhere more lively?

t_ch: 只是挂个名的话，倒可以接受。
t_en: Being a figurehead is acceptable, I suppose.

t_ch: 但先说清楚，招待小动物吃饭这种琐事，我不想管，以及……
t_en: But to be clear, I have no interest in mundane tasks like feeding small animals, and also...

t_ch: 来餐馆上班吧，那刻夏老师！
t_en: Join our restaurant staff, Professor Anaxa!

t_ch: 叫我阿那克萨戈拉斯老师。
t_en: That's Professor Anaxagoras to you.

t_ch: 灰宝，农田里的巨型蔬菜都成熟啦，我感觉很适合作为餐馆的宣传物料，就带了些过来。
t_en: Grayie, those giant vegetables from the fields are fully ripe now! They'd make excellent promotional items for the restaurant, so I brought a few.

t_ch: 想想看，到底该怎么使用呢？
t_en: I wonder how we should best put them to use...

t_ch: …不得不说，这些巨大蔬菜还真挺沉的，我和万敌搬得都快累瘫了。
t_en: These giant vegetables are remarkably heavy. Hauling them here even exhausted me and Mydei.

t_ch: 那是你的力气不够。
t_en: That's what happens when you lack proper strength.

t_ch: 好啦，趁现在顾客还没上门，我们快点来装饰餐馆吧！
t_en: Come on! Let's get the restaurant decorated before the customers show up!

t_ch: 不错，不错。这正是我预想中的模样。
t_en: Very good. This is exactly what I had in mind.

t_ch: 老师，别光顾着观察巨型作物了，来帮忙做开店的准备呀。
t_en: Professor, stop admiring the giant crops and help us get ready to open!

t_ch: 看来我们的农林专家对成果很满意呢。妖精们也陆陆续续地到了，快开始营业吧。
t_en: Looks like our agricultural expert is pleased with the results. The fairies are starting to arrive now too. Time to open for business!

t_ch: ——迷路迷境的丰收节，今天总算要正式开幕啦。
t_en: The Harvest Festival at Membrance Maze is finally opening today.

t_ch: 哈哈哈哈。这便是所谓的乐极生悲吧。
t_en: Hahaha. This is what they call "too much of a good thing," I suppose.

t_ch: 我拒绝。明知有最优解的前提下，主动选择错误答案，这是愚蠢的行径。
t_en: I refuse. Intentionally choosing the wrong path when the best solution is clear is nothing but stupidity.

t_ch: 又发生什么事了？
t_en: What is it this time?

t_ch: 灰宝！你来得正好，快帮我们劝劝那刻夏老师吧。
t_en: Grayie! Thank goodness you're here. Help us talk some sense into Professor Anaxa!

t_ch: 农田里的巨型蔬菜产量实在太高，多到连厨房都堆不下。餐馆日常营业根本用不完这么多食材，快要放坏掉了，大家正在为此而发愁呢。
t_en: The giant vegetables are overproducing drastically. We've run out of storage space in the kitchen. There's no way we can use all these ingredients during regular service, and they're starting to rot. Everyone's totally stressed about it.

t_ch: 但老师，说什么都不愿意减少农作物的产量……
t_en: But the professor refuses to reduce crop yields, no matter what we say...

t_ch: 第一，农田产能并非说减就能减、如此方便操作之物。
t_en: First, crop productivity isn't something you can just dial down. It's not that simple.

t_ch: 第二，即便有办法，我也不愿施行。好不容易实现突破，却要退回原本的境地，我无法接受如此短视的做法。没有任何商谈余地。
t_en: Second, even if possible, I wouldn't do it. After finally achieving this breakthrough, going backward is unacceptable. This short-sighted approach is entirely out of the question.

t_ch: 我同意，多就是好。
t_en: I agree. More is always better.

t_ch: 我能理解老师的想法，但就这么浪费食材也不行呀。
t_en: I see your point, professor, but letting all this food go to waste doesn't make sense either.

t_ch: 浪费粮食可耻！
t_en: Wasting food is just wrong!

t_ch: 哼，浪费我的研究成果难道就值得夸耀么？
t_en: Hmph, is wasting my research achievements something to brag about?

t_ch: 既要顾全农田产量，又要消耗掉数目如此庞大的蔬菜，呵，确是难以破解的死局啊。
t_en: High farm production AND using up all these veggies? Ha! Sounds like we're stuck between a rock and a hard place.

t_ch: 嗐，这有什么难的，不就是想办法把东西卖出去嘛？不瞒你们，我最擅长这个了。
t_en: Pfft, that's nothing! We just gotta sell it all! Trust me, this is right up my alley.

t_ch: …交给我，包各位满意！
t_en: Leave it to me, and I'll make sure everyone's happy!

t_ch: 蔬菜滞销，帮帮我们吧！
t_en: Help! Our vegetables are piling up!

t_ch: 既然是灰子的请求，以咱俩的交情，我当然没有不帮的道理，对吧？
t_en: Since it's Gray Mystery asking, I couldn't possibly say no! With our history, how could I refuse?

t_ch: 你不是这辈子都不会工作吗？
t_en: Didn't you say you'd never work another day in your life?

t_ch: 此一时，彼一时嘛。再说，以咱俩的交情，我当然没有不帮的道理，对吧？
t_en: Times change, my friend! Besides, with our history, how could I possibly say no?

t_ch: 我说啊，你们想的太复杂了。卖货这种事，最重要的就两点…要么稀缺，要么便宜。
t_en: Listen, you're making this too complicated. Selling stuff comes down to two things: either make it rare, or make it cheap.

t_ch: 要是能让那群小动物相信，这是瑟希斯种出来的神奇果实，有着延年益寿、益智健体的功效，那也行，只是实行起来比较麻烦。
t_en: I mean, we could tell the critters these are Cerces's magical fruits that'll make them live longer, get smarter, and stay healthy. Though that would be such a pain to actually do...

t_ch: 最简单的，当然就是降价大促销啦。既能清空库存，还能赚波大的，两难自解！
t_en: Honestly, the easiest thing would be a big fat discount sale! Clear everything out, make a nice profit, and poof — no more problem!

t_ch: 灰子…不对，是店长。怎么样，就让我来当这个促销负责人吧？
t_en: So, Gray Mystery... sorry, I mean Manager. What do you think? Just let me run this sale!

t_ch: 绝对有猫腻！
t_en: There's definitely something fishy!

t_ch: 当然有呀。你看…喵~
t_en: That's because cats like fish! Meow~

t_ch: 好像也不是不行…
t_en: I suppose it could work...

t_ch: 别犹豫啦，双重否定就是行！
t_en: That sounds like a yes to me!

t_ch: 没人反对的话，我就接手咯？餐馆扭亏为盈，全看我的啦！
t_en: No objections? Then I'm in charge now! Just watch me turn this restaurant from loss to profit!

t_ch: 感到迷茫的时候，不妨听听赛飞儿怎么说。
t_en: Need some business advice? Listen to my pearls of wisdom!

t_ch: 她说…<size=28>餐馆所有菜品大促销，走过路过不要错过！！！</size>
t_en: And it goes... <size=28>"Everything on sale at this restaurant! Come one, come all!"</size>

t_ch: 迷？这家餐馆在办活动，好划算的样子，我们去看看迷！
t_en: Mem? This restaurant's having a sale event. Looks like a great deal! Let's check it out!

t_ch: 迷迷！在这里吃饭能省好多钱，我也要尝迷！
t_en: Mem mem! We'll save a fortune dining here. I've got to try it too!

t_ch: ——欢迎光临，欢迎呼朋唤友前来就餐！
t_en: Welcome! Feel free to bring friends and family to dine with us!

t_ch: 我们不仅准备了力度极大的优惠活动，更是邀请到了某位重量级嘉宾，为到场顾客讲解神奇果实的好处。喜欢的话，记得给餐馆点个赞噢。
t_en: We've prepared incredible discounts AND invited a special guest to explain all about these wondrous fruits. If you enjoy your meal, please remember to leave us a 5-star rating!

t_ch: 有请——奥赫玛最最最最最富有的，金织女士！
t_en: Please welcome — the absolutely, positively, definitely richest person in Okhema, Lady Goldweaver!

t_ch: 呵。我原本收到的请求，只是帮你编织金线，并不包括所谓的宣传吧？
t_en: Hmph. If I recall correctly, my agreement was to weave golden thread for you, not to participate in any sales activities.

t_ch: 哎呀，阿雅，就是回答几个问题，有什么关系嘛。
t_en: Oh come on, Agy, it's just answering a few questions. What's the harm?

t_ch: 再说啦，现在的我可是大促销节负责人，餐馆全体员工都任由我差遣。灰子同意的话，我甚至可以派你去厨房烧菜噢。
t_en: Plus, I'm now running this entire sale! The entire restaurant staff is at my disposal. If Gray Mystery agrees, I could even assign you kitchen duty!

t_ch: 对吧…店长？
t_en: Isn't that right... Manager?

t_ch: 想看阿格莱雅做饭！
t_en: I'd love to see Aglaea cooking!

t_ch: 若是店长不介意菜单上只有燕麦粥的话，那我也可尝试一番。
t_en: If you don't mind with just oatmeal porridge on the menu, I suppose I could make an attempt.

t_ch: 去田里种地好像也不错？
t_en: Perhaps field work would suit you better?

t_ch: 若只是劳役之事，我大可派衣匠代为完成，且不收取任何佣金。如何？
t_en: For simple physical labor, I could simply send the Garmentmaker in my place, at no cost whatsoever. Would that suffice?

t_ch: 赛飞儿，别太得意忘形了。
t_en: Cipher, you're taking this too far.

t_ch: 哪有！这不是正常的给餐馆打广告嘛，阿雅都多久没露面了，该出来玩玩啦。
t_en: I'm not! This is standard promotional work! Plus, Agy never gets out enough. She needs to be more social!

t_ch: 罢了。既然是店长选定的主导者，我也不多说什么。你问吧。
t_en: Very well. Since the Manager appointed you, I won't argue further. Ask away.

t_ch: 那我开始咯。提问！——在金织女士看来，这些果实的神奇之处在哪儿呢？
t_en: Here we go! First question! Lady Goldweaver, in your opinion, what makes these fruits so wondrous?

t_ch: 能生长得比普通作物更为庞大，这本就是受赐福的表现。
t_en: The fact they grow larger than regular crops is a sign of blessings.

t_ch: 更何况，果实的外形匀称，味道鲜美，作为餐桌上的佳肴再适合不过。
t_en: Not to mention their perfect symmetry and exquisite flavor. They're absolutely ideal as culinary ingredients.

t_ch: 连金织女士吃了都说好！现场的各位，还不赶快下单购买？
t_en: Even Lady Goldweaver endorses them! Everyone, hurry up and place your orders!

t_ch: 迷！我、我要买十个！打包带走迷！
t_en: Mem! I—I'll take ten! To go, please!

t_ch: 有意购买的顾客，请在这边登记哦。大家排好队，库存绝对足够，不用抢啦。
t_en: If you'd like to make a purchase, please sign up here. Everyone form a line, please. Don't worry. We've got plenty in stock for everyone!

t_ch: *我们*负责送货！很快就会到家门口了！
t_en: And *we* take care of all the deliveries! They'll be at your doorstep in no time!

t_ch: 感谢惠顾~
t_en: Thanks for shopping with us~

t_ch: 下一个问题！我们收到了部分顾客的来信，据说啊，有妖精担心如此庞大的农作物，是通过技术手段人为培育出来的，对身体有害。
t_en: Next question! We've received correspondence from customers worried that these enormous vegetables, possibly technologically modified, might be unsafe to eat.

t_ch: 金织女士，你怎么看呢？
t_en: Lady Goldweaver, how would you address these concerns?

t_ch: 无稽之谈。尽管这位农业专家…呵，理念极为独特，但他的品行倒是不必怀疑。
t_en: Preposterous claims. While our agricultural expert admittedly has... peculiar methodologies, his integrity is unimpeachable.

t_ch: 用不着你给我说好话。
t_en: I didn't ask for your endorsement.

t_ch: 金织女士愿意用自身的名誉为神奇果实担保，绝对天然无污染，各位大可放心购买！
t_en: Lady Goldweaver personally vouches for these wondrous fruits! <unbreak>100%</unbreak> natural and pollution-free! So go ahead and buy as many as you want!

t_ch: 让我们继续……
t_en: Let's take another...

t_ch: …赛法利娅。
t_en: ...Cifera.

t_ch: 差不多玩够了吧？再闹下去，要耽误餐馆经营了。
t_en: Alright, enough. Keep this up, and you'll interfere with the restaurant's actual business.

t_ch: 嘁。好吧好吧，反正吸引的客流量也够了。促销会就到这里，大家——
t_en: Fine, whatever. We've got plenty of customers now anyway. That's the end of our sale, everyone—

t_ch: 准备营业啦！
t_en: We're now open for business!

t_ch: 迷！最喜欢这种实惠的活动了，要是能永远持续就好了迷……
t_en: Mem! I just love these bargain events. Wish they could be permanent...

t_ch: 从结果来看，促销活动为餐馆带来了相当可观的营收，就此常驻也并非不可能。
t_en: Based on these results, this sale has brought impressive revenue to the restaurant. Making it permanent is definitely an option.

t_ch: 妖精们也都很开心呢。果然，大家还是对便宜的商品没有抵抗力呀。
t_en: All the fairies seem delighted. Everyone really does love a good deal.

t_ch: 当然啦，谁能拒绝口袋里的钱越变越多呢。灰子，我这次干得还不错吧？
t_en: Of course! Who doesn't love saving money? Gray Mystery, didn't I do an amazing job this time?

t_ch: 表扬你！
t_en: You nailed it!

t_ch: 嘿，感谢！我就问心无愧地收下啦。
t_en: Aww, thanks! That's what I like to hear!

t_ch: 还有不小的进步空间。
t_en: You could definitely do better.

t_ch: 哎呀，这么严格干嘛。灰子也越来越有店长的样子了，没意思。
t_en: Wow, tough crowd! Look who's become all manager-like and boring! Not cool, Gray Mystery!

t_ch: 说起来，为何你会来餐馆主动承担职责？这和我所知的那个赛法利娅可不一样。
t_en: But why would you willingly take on work at the restaurant? This isn't like the Cifera I know.

t_ch: 人心中的成见哪，总是比创世涡心里的水还深。就不能是我突发善心，想做点好事吗？
t_en: People's prejudices run deeper than the waters in the Vortex of Genesis. Is it so hard to believe I might have a sudden urge to do something nice?

t_ch: 店长，你信她说的么？
t_en: Do you actually believe her, manager?

t_ch: 当然不信。
t_en: Absolutely not.

t_ch: 肯定是有利可图！
t_en: She's clearly after something!

t_ch: 好吧好吧，也不卖关子了。灰子，我帮了这么大的忙，要点报酬不过分吧？
t_en: Okay, okay, no more games. Gray Mystery, after all my help, a little compensation isn't too much to ask, is it?

t_ch: 呵。捷足爵是对我评定的薪资不满么？
t_en: Hmph. Is Dux Celeripes unhappy with the compensation I've assigned?

t_ch: 哪敢呀。凯撒大人的裁决当然公正，只不过…想笼络人心，有时得付出点额外代价。
t_en: How could I? The Great Imperator's decisions are undoubtedly just, but... earning loyalty sometimes requires a little extra incentive.

t_ch: 要的不多，一枚妖精金币足矣。不至于连这点小钱都舍不得吧？
t_en: I'm not asking much, just one fairy coin. You wouldn't deny me such a modest amount, would you?

t_ch: 但你得继续来餐馆打工才行。
t_en: Only if you stay on as restaurant staff.

t_ch: 唉。好吧好吧…为了挣一块钱而献出所有的模样，像极了人生啊。
t_en: Ugh, fine... sacrificing everything for a single coin. Sounds just like real life.

t_ch: 就当给你的绩效奖吧。
t_en: Consider it a bonus for your good work.

t_ch: 店长大气！我就拿走属于我的那块钱咯。
t_en: How magnanimous! I'll just take my well-earned coin then.

t_ch: 好啦，今天的营业结束了，按照日程，大家一起去参加迷其林美食评审吧。
t_en: Well, that's the end of today's service! As scheduled, we should all proceed to the Memchelin Food Review now.

t_ch: 呵呵。帮忙经营餐馆的各位贵客，辛苦了哪。
t_en: Hehe. My distinguished guests who helped with the restaurant, thank you for your hard work.

t_ch: 啊，评审员和村长居然亲自到访！可惜餐馆打烊了，没法拿出美味的菜品招待……
t_en: Oh, the reviewer and the chief are here in person! Unfortunately, we've already closed. We can't offer you any of our delicious meals...

t_ch: 不用客气。我和村长过来，是有好消息要告诉各位。
t_en: Please, don't worry about that. The chief and I have come with good news for all of you.

t_ch: 要给我们发奖金？
t_en: Are we getting bonuses?

t_ch: 即便有报酬，若是将妖精使用的钱币发给各位，恐怕也没人会想要吧。
t_en: Even with compensation, I doubt fairy currency would be of much interest to you.

t_ch: …看我干嘛？
t_en: Why are you looking at me like that?

t_ch: 不会还有个坏消息吧？
t_en: You don't also have bad news, do you?

t_ch: 即便幸运与厄运从来相伴相生，但说不定，这次只有好事找上门来呢。
t_en: While good and bad luck often come together, perhaps this time only good one has arrived.

t_ch: 我知道，是村长的「惊喜」！
t_en: I know. It's the chief's "surprise"!

t_ch: 我还以为会是个秘密，没想到，{NICKNAME}阁下早已听说了。
t_en: I assumed this would be kept secret, yet {NICKNAME} seems already informed.

t_ch: 说实话，我将重振餐馆的重任交给各位时，从未想到会有如此繁盛的局面。
t_en: Honestly, when I tasked you with revitalizing the restaurant, I never expected such tremendous prosperity.

t_ch: 如今，「{TEXTJOIN#225}」的名号响彻整个迷境，孩子们都为品尝到你们制作的美食而欣喜。餐馆举办的活动，也收获了一致好评。
t_en: Now the name of {TEXTJOIN#225} echoes across the entire Maze, with children excitedly enjoying your culinary creations. Your special events have earned unanimous praise.

t_ch: 各位为经营餐馆而付出的努力，我都看在眼里，并由衷地表示感谢。
t_en: I've seen your tireless efforts managing this restaurant, and I'm deeply thankful.

t_ch: 作为回报，妖精们特意准备了一份超级大礼。由这位特邀评审员公证，我宣布——
t_en: In return, the fairies have prepared a magnificent gift. With our special guest reviewer as witness, I hereby declare...

t_ch: <size=28>「{TEXTJOIN#225}」的第四次迷其林美食评审，直接通过！</size>
t_en: <size=28>{TEXTJOIN#225} has automatically passed its fourth Memchelin Food Review!</size>

t_ch: 太好了！成为四星级餐馆了！
t_en: That's wonderful! We're a 4-star restaurant now!

t_ch: 虽说是件值得开心的事，但总感觉…凭伙伴们的实力，通过美食评审还挺轻松的？
t_en: It's definitely exciting, but honestly... with everyone's abilities, passing the review wasn't much of a challenge, I suppose?

t_ch: 就这？是不是有点简单了。
t_en: That's it? Seems a bit too easy.

t_ch: 村长，这件事不是我们特意过来的重点。
t_en: Chief, this isn't really why we're here.

t_ch: 噢，噢！抱歉抱歉，我给弄混了。真正要说的事不是这个。
t_en: Oh, oh! My apologies, I got sidetracked. That's not what we came to say.

t_ch: 就是…对！我想起来了，为感谢餐馆对迷境美食文化发展做出的贡献，我们——
t_en: Well, it's... ah! That's right! To thank your restaurant for its amazing contributions to the Maze's food culture, we...

t_ch: <size=28>召集迷境里所有妖精，为各位准备了一场最盛大的晚宴！</size>
t_en: <size=28>Calling all fairies in the Maze, we've prepared the most spectacular banquet for you all!</size>

t_ch: 还请店长与各位贵客，务必拨冗参加哪。
t_en: We insist that you and all distinguished guests attend.

t_ch: 好啊，我最喜欢吃席了！
t_en: Sounds great! I love a good banquet!

t_ch: 一定准时到。
t_en: We'll definitely be there.

t_ch: 呵呵，那便如此约好了。
t_en: Hehe, then it's agreed.

t_ch: 希望在迷路迷境生活的这段时光，能成为你们珍贵的回忆哪。
t_en: May your time in the Membrance Maze become a treasured memory.

t_ch: 迷境最盛大的宴会，究竟是什么样的呢？{NICKNAME}一定也很好奇吧。
t_en: What could the Maze's most spectacular banquet be like? You must be wondering too, right?

t_ch: 都忙完了的话，就快出发吧。要是我们迟迟不到，妖精们就只能眼巴巴地等着啦。
t_en: If we're all set, we should get going. We don't want to keep all those fairies waiting for us.

t_ch: 参加宴会当然要积极！
t_en: Always ready for a banquet!

t_ch: 嘻，人家也很期待呢。走吧，我们这就去看看！
t_en: Hehe, I can't wait either! Let's go check it out!

t_ch: 餐馆还有事要处理…
t_en: There's still work to do at the restaurant...

t_ch: {NICKNAME}还真是有责任心呀。快去吧，可别让妖精们等太久哦。
t_en: {NICKNAME}, always so dedicated! Go ahead and finish up. Just try not to keep the fairies waiting too long.

t_ch: 迷路迷境的孩子们，期待已久的宴会——终于要开始了哪！
t_en: Children of Membrance Maze, the long-awaited feast... is finally here!

t_ch: 迷！宴会！全都是好吃的，喜欢！
t_en: Mem! Feast! So many tasty things. I'm so happy!

t_ch: 真令人期待呀。
t_en: Everyone's looking forward to it!

t_ch: 来吧，大家都在为宴会做准备，我们也不能闲着。首先，嗯…就来把场地打扮得漂漂亮亮的吧！
t_en: Come on, everyone's busy getting ready for the feast. We can't just stand around! First things first... let's get the venue looking nice and pretty!

t_ch: 迷！我们正在把神奇果实，装进大盆里！
t_en: Mem! We're gathering these wondrous fruits and piling them into big tubs!

t_ch: 但神奇果实太重了。我们，实在搬不动迷……
t_en: But these wondrous fruits are too heavy... We can't lift them, mem...

t_ch: 要搬运这个，是有点太为难妖精们了，我们帮帮忙吧。
t_en: Hauling these around is a bit too much for the fairies. Come on, let's help them out.

t_ch: 迷！神奇果实，堆了好高！比所有妖精加起来都要高！
t_en: Mem! The wondrous fruits are stacked so high... Taller than all the fairies put together!

t_ch: 好漂亮，谢谢你们迷！
t_en: Beautiful! Thank you, mem!

t_ch: 迷！空荡荡的，好适合跳舞迷！
t_en: Mem! It's so spacious, perfect for dancing memi!

t_ch: 快下来迷！这是用来吃饭的地方，村长发现要生气了迷。
t_en: Hurry down, mem! This is the dining area. If Chief sees, they'll be mad, memim!

t_ch: 举办宴会，桌面上都空着可不行，把装过盘的菜品都端出来吧。
t_en: We can't have a feast with empty tables. Let's bring out all the dishes that are ready to serve.

t_ch: 迷！味道好香！肚子在迷迷叫了迷……
t_en: Memem! It smells so good! My tummy's rumbling, mem...

t_ch: 宴会还没正式开始，得先忍忍迷……
t_en: The feast hasn't officially started yet... We have to resist for a bit longer, mem...

t_ch: 锵锵，场地都布置好啦，是不是还挺像模像样的？
t_en: Ta-da! The venue's all set up. Not bad, right? Looks pretty official!

t_ch: 偷偷尝一口，应该不会添麻烦吧？
t_en: No one will mind if I just have a tiny bite, right?

t_ch: 没事，我帮你挡着。
t_en: Go ahead, I'll cover you.

t_ch: 嘻，我开玩笑的，就想看看你的反应。果然，{NICKNAME}从来不会让人失望。
t_en: I was only joking! I just wanted to see your reaction. And sure enough, {NICKNAME}, you never let me down.

t_ch: 但既然你都这么说了，人家就恭敬不如从命咯？
t_en: But since you offered... I'd be rude not to accept, wouldn't I?

t_ch: 报告，昔涟打算偷吃！
t_en: Heads up! Cyrene's trying to sneak a taste!

t_ch: 哎呀，背叛来得如此决绝，好令人受伤呀……
t_en: Oh... such a merciless betrayal... How could you?

t_ch: 嘻，但既然都被揭发了，那人家就不客气咯？
t_en: Hehe, but since I've already been caught red-handed... I guess I'll just help myself!

t_ch: 说不定村长会悄悄飘过来，拜托你守好背后……
t_en: The chief might sneak up on us at any moment... I'm counting on you to watch my back...

t_ch: 好好吃！虽然是尝过好多遍的菜品，但在宴会上别有一番风味呢！来，你要不要也尝一口……
t_en: This is so good! I've had these dishes plenty of times before, but somehow they taste even better at a feast! Come on, have a taste!

t_ch: 迷！小涟，村长在找你！
t_en: Mem! Reney, Chief is looking for you!

t_ch: 呀！这就来！
t_en: Ah! Be right there!

t_ch: 嗯…不知村长找我是什么事呢？真遗憾，明明气氛刚刚好……
t_en: Hmm... I wonder what the village chief needs me for? What a pity. Things were just getting good...

t_ch: 算啦。趁着宴会还没开始，去和伙伴们聊聊天吧。大家忙活这么久，肯定也有好多话想说。
t_en: Ah well. Since the feast hasn't started yet, might as well take the chance to chat with everyone. After working so hard, I bet they've got lots to say.

t_ch: 留下的究竟是快乐的回忆，还是说仍有烦恼，和没能实现的愿望呢？身为店长，了解员工也是你的职责哦。
t_en: Are they full of smiles and fond memories? Or left with concerns and unfulfilled wishes? As the manager, it's your responsibility to understand your employees.

t_ch: 所以，去吧——在这场宴会落幕前，别留下遗憾呀。
t_en: So before the feast comes to an end, make sure you don't leave with any regrets.

t_ch: …值得回忆的事？没什么印象深刻的。
t_en: ...Something worth remembering? Nothing really left a deep impression.

t_ch: 真要说的话，从地里拔几颗菜就开始烹饪的做派，让我回想起四处流亡的时光，简单、高效，追求的是果腹而非口味。
t_en: If I had to pick... then the straightforward style of pulling up vegetables and cooking them right away brings back memories of my days wandering in exile: simple, efficient, focused on sustenance over flavor.

t_ch: 不觉得很有意思嘛，万敌身为悬锋的战士，却是黄金裔中最精通烹饪的那个。无论多简单的食材，经由他手都能变成美食。
t_en: Funny isn't it? Mydei, a great Kremnoan warrior, is actually the most skilled cook among the Chrysos Heirs. No matter how simple the ingredients, they become a delicacy in his hands.

t_ch: 悬锋城的字典没几个词，菜谱倒是截然相反。
t_en: The Kremnoan dictionary may be pretty sparse, but their recipe book? Vast and diverse.

t_ch: 给你一个建议：放弃那不切实际的沙拉吧。优秀的厨师不会挑剔食材，利用手头的材料做好每一道菜，才算是对它们的敬意。
t_en: Want my advice? Forget that fancy salad. The mark of a great chef is making the most of what's at hand. They don't nitpick ingredients.

t_ch: 或许我的厨艺比不上你，但沙拉这个选择没有问题。我只为我能负责的食材负责，并且贯彻到底，这同样是厨师应有的品质。
t_en: Perhaps my cooking skills aren't on your level, but there's nothing wrong with making a salad. I stand by the ingredients I select and follow through with them. That's also what it means to be a proper chef.

t_ch: 哼。脚踏实地，这点还不错。
t_en: Hmph. At least you're practical. I can respect that.

t_ch: 说回原本的话题吧。村长从很早时候就一直念叨着，希望妖精们能美美饱餐一顿。
t_en: Back to the main point, the chief has been saying for ages how much they hope the fairies can enjoy a hearty, delicious feast.

t_ch: 所以，看到大家共同经营的餐馆实现了这一愿望，我还挺开心的。
t_en: That's why seeing everyone's efforts to turn this dream into reality through our restaurant makes me so happy.

t_ch: 至于遗憾么…在厨艺方面没能赢过万敌，另外就是，还没来得及多学几道拿手菜，餐馆经营就接近尾声了，总觉得快乐的时光有些短暂呀。
t_en: As for regrets... Well, one would be that I couldn't best Mydei in the kitchen. The other is, I didn't get the chance to learn more specialty dishes before the restaurant's run came to an end. Time really does fly when you're having fun.

t_ch: 流亡的时候，我也这么想过。若是时间流淌得慢些，他们也不至于如此窘迫地离开。
t_en: During those years in exile, I often thought that... if only time could pass more slowly, they wouldn't have to leave me in such horrible ways.

t_ch: 但追忆过往没什么意义。
t_en: Still, reminiscing about the past doesn't change anything.

t_ch: 替我照顾族人的人情，我已经还了。另外，给你个忠告，哀丽秘榭的白厄。
t_en: The kindness you showed in taking care of my people has been repaid. And here's a piece of advice for you, Phainon of Aedes Elysiae.

t_ch: 直说吧，迈德漠斯。在这里没什么需要顾忌的。
t_en: Speak your mind, Mydeimos. There's no need for restraint in this place.

t_ch: 趁来得及的时候，多看几眼你的故乡吧。
t_en: Cherish your homeland while you still can.

t_ch: 不对不对！*我们*才是前辈，这种时候该由*我们*来提问！
t_en: No, no! We are the seniors here. At a time like this, we should be asking the questions!

t_ch: 都集中注意哦，老师的问题是，在迷路迷境的游学旅行很快就要结束啦，大家有什么宝贵的感悟，或者难忘的回忆呢？
t_en: Everyone, pay attention! The teacher's question is: With our field trip to Membrance Maze soon coming to an end, what valuable insights or unforgettable memories have you gained?

t_ch: 抢答时间！没人举手的话，*我们*要点名咯！
t_en: Alright, answer time! If no one raises their hand, then we are going to start picking people!

t_ch: 我、我！缇宝老师，我想要第一个分享~
t_en: Ooh, me, me! Teacher Tribbie, I want to share first!

t_ch: 好呀好呀！小风堇，就由你来给大家做个榜样吧。
t_en: Great, Cinny! You can go first and show everyone how it's done!

t_ch: 咳。得听好啦，我有…关于那刻夏老师的、很重要的秘密要公布！
t_en: Everyone, listen up. I'm going to reveal... a very important secret about Professor Anaxa!

t_ch: 众所周知，老师待人极其严格，从不轻易夸奖大地兽之外的学生。但是！
t_en: As everyone knows, the professor is extremely strict and almost never praises any student other than dromases. But!

t_ch: 我可是听到了哦，老师悄悄向村长打听妖精的教育方式，还盛赞田地的那几位农夫干活非常认真，勤劳乖巧，比树庭的贤人都要强！原话是……
t_en: I happened to overhear! The professor quietly asked the chief about the fairies' education methods, and went on to praise those farmers in the fields, calling them hardworking, disciplined, and even better than the Sages of the Grove! His exact words were...

t_ch: 「树庭学者耗尽毕生心血得到的成果，都不及妖精随手播下的种子。」
t_en: "The life's work of the Grove's scholars doesn't even compare to a single seed casually sown by a fairy."

t_ch: 有什么问题吗？要论心思纯粹，没有人比得过这些妖精，未经泰坦信仰蒙蔽的眼睛，能看清的事物远超我们想象。
t_en: And what indeed is the problem with this? In terms of purity of heart, none can match these fairies. Their vision, untainted by Titan dogma, perceives things far beyond our comprehension.

t_ch: 要求村长多派些妖精去树庭给老师做义工，也是这个原因吗？
t_en: So... this was why you asked the chief to send more fairies to volunteer at the Grove?

t_ch: 算是吧。
t_en: You could say that.

t_ch: 不许欺负妖精，要照常给它们回报哦！好啦，小风堇的发言结束，下一个会是谁呢？
t_en: No taking advantage of the fairies! Make sure they're properly rewarded! Alright, that's Cinny's turn. Who's up next?

t_ch: 没人主动举手了吗？那*我们*要点名了哦。
t_en: No hands up? Then we are going to start calling out names!

t_ch: ——小夏！
t_en: ...Naxy!

t_ch: 如此反复逼问，反倒显得有些刻意了。
t_en: All this repeated questioning is making things rather exhausting.

t_ch: 我对玩乐并无兴趣，能称得上幸事的，唯有——
t_en: I find no joy in games or amusement. The only thing I consider a true blessing is...

t_ch: 果然，那刻夏老师还是对自己亲手栽培的作物念念不忘呀。
t_en: I knew it. Professor Anaxa can't help but be attached to the crops he grew all by himself.

t_ch: 我有个提议！要不，在老师的教学内容中新增一门课程吧，名字我都想好了，就叫作——论巨大作物与大地兽的共通之处。怎么样？
t_en: I have a suggestion! How about adding a new course to the professor's curriculum? I've even thought of a name: "Common Traits of Giant Crops and Dromases." How does that sound?

t_ch: 不必了。若是将那神奇作物带回树庭，怕不是真要坐实我「毒害」青年的恶名了。
t_en: That won't be necessary. Bringing those wondrous crops back to the Grove would only seal my reputation as the one who "corrupts youths."

t_ch: …下一个。
t_en: ...Next.

t_ch: 下一个！
t_en: Next!

t_ch: 不对哦，按照顺序，这次该轮到灰宝啦！
t_en: Not so fast! If we're sticking to the order of the list, it's Grayie's turn.

t_ch: …轮到我了？
t_en: ...My turn?

t_ch: 唔。本来该是这样，但小灰是店长，这个问题得留到最后再问！
t_en: Hmm... that's how it should be, but since Little Gray is the manager, this question should be saved for the end!

t_ch: 所以，现在到*我们*啦！
t_en: So, we are up next!

t_ch: 想分享的快乐…明明有很多，却不知道从哪说起。
t_en: There are so many joyful moments to share... we don't know where to begin.

t_ch: 毕竟*我们*之间根本就用不着分享！
t_en: After all, words aren't needed between the three of us!

t_ch: 但是不可以耍赖皮！*我们*开心的事，很简单！就是三个人一起，和大家无忧无虑地生活！
t_en: But no excuses! What makes us the happiest is simple: the three of us, living carefree with everyone else!

t_ch: 还有，和小妖精一起玩。
t_en: Also playing with the little fairies.

t_ch: 还有还有！一直都没找到机会说出口的——小小灰，谢谢你！
t_en: Oh, oh, and also! We never found the right moment to say this. But thank you, Little Gray!

t_ch: 以及…好久不见！
t_en: Also... long time no see!
